title: thelypteris clavata
intro: Thelypteris clavata, also known as the forked wood fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Thelypteris clavata include its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which help to soothe coughs and reduce inflammation in the lungs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
